title: D1aMonD's SB pack
description: Its all the mods I (Tha_D1aMonD_NL) use for Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
A pack I use for Hypixel Skyblock.

# Mods I have to mention:
- [Patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher)
- [Skyblock Addons](https://biscuit.codes/mods/skyblockaddons/)
# Mods to download separately:
- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar&x=28c4)
- [Zoomer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zoomer/download/2914701)
- [Time changer](https://github.com/davidwcode/Revamped-TimeChanger/releases/tag/v1.2.1)
- [Dungeon rooms](https://github.com/Quantizr/DungeonRoomsMod/releases/tag/v3.4.1)
- [Bossbar customizer](https://sk1er.club/mods/bossbar_customizer)
